home_h1_1: The Country Home for Your Dog
home_h2_4: The Perfect Start for Your Best Friend
home_h2_5: Responsible Care, Clean Facilities, and True Love for Dogs
home_h2_6: Trust Built with Every Dog and Owner
home_h3_8: Welcome to Puppies in the Village
home_h3_9: Licensed pet supply store and breeding facility - everything in one place, with a big heart and genuine care.
home_p_20:
At Puppies in the Village you'll find everything under one roof - a family dog breeding facility where puppies grow up in a rural atmosphere with proper exposure that contributes to their physical and mental health. We provide warm and loving care, a safe living environment, a large yard for energy release, and quality nutrition alongside routine veterinary care. Additionally, on-site pet supply store with quality products personally tailored for all types of dogs,

including convenient home delivery service.
home_p_21: Quality food, accessories, toys, collars and leashes - everything carefully selected for your dog. A dog supplies store close to you, with professional knowledge and personalized service.
home_p_23: Puppies raised in a peaceful rural environment, with professional guidance throughout the journey. A dog breeding facility that believes in transparency, health and true love for the breed.
home_p_26: At Puppies in the Village, we believe that every dog deserves the same care you would want for a family member. Our standards aren't just slogans — they are part of the daily routine in our dog family.  Our breeding home is family-oriented in nature, the dogs grow up in a unique rural atmosphere with a huge yard for walks and energy release. The proper exposure and natural environment contribute to the physical and mental health of the puppies
home_p_27: Every dog in our boarding facility receives personal attention throughout the day with walks, feeding at regular hours, and warm human contact that reduces separation anxiety, while maintaining their overall health. We ensure healthy and quality nutrition, routine veterinary care such as vaccinations and deworming, and of course availability for emergency treatments.
home_p_28: Our facility is maintained according to strict cleaning protocols. Dogs stay in spacious, ventilated and sanitized spaces, because your dog's health is our top priority.
home_p_29: From newborn puppies to senior dogs - our team is skilled in caring for varying needs, including dogs with special sensitivities, different breeds, and diverse temperaments.
home_p_30: We work with small and large breeds and offer reliable and professional service. Additionally, we also offer home delivery option for your convenience, as part of our service tailored to your needs.
home_p_32: Dog owners who chose Gorim BaKfar - for puppy adoption and daily equipment
home_p_33: "I ordered food and supplies for my dog through Gorim BaKfar, and the delivery arrived really quickly to my home. Everything was packed neatly, the products were exactly as ordered, and the service was pleasant and available for any questions. I will definitely order from them again"
home_p_34: "We received our puppy from the breeding facility with all the documents, vaccinations, and detailed guidance. They answered every question patiently and helped us start life with the best dog there is."
home_p_35: "A dog supply store near me that finally has everything, from quality food to accessories I couldn't find anywhere else. The staff always recommends exactly what's suitable for the breed and age of the dog."
home_p_36:
Whether you're looking for a new puppy from a licensed breeding facility, or personal consultation for the right equipment
Our team is here for you.
We'd be happy to answer any question and find together the right solution for you and your dog.
home_p_37:
Inquiries about puppies and store consultations all start in the same place.
We'd love to hear from you.

new_p_320: Gorim BaKfar emphasizes fast and reliable delivery of all orders. This policy details shipping terms, delivery times, and shipping costs.
new_p_322: We provide shipping services throughout Israel, including:
new_p_327: Estimated delivery times from order placement:
new_p_333: Shipping cost will be displayed on the payment page before completing the order. Costs may vary according to:
new_p_345: In case of shipment not collected from distribution point:
new_p_350: If you received a damaged package:
new_p_355: For shipping-related questions, you can contact us:
new_p_358: We provide deliveries throughout the country via external shipping companies.
new_p_359: Estimated delivery time: 3 to 7 business days, unless otherwise specified on the product page.
new_p_360: Business days do not include Fridays, Saturdays, holiday eves, and holidays.
new_p_361: Delivery times are estimated and may change due to congestion, delays from shipping companies, or circumstances beyond our control.
new_p_362: When the order is shipped, a tracking number may be sent to the customer according to the shipping company's availability.
new_p_363: It is the customer's responsibility to ensure that the shipping details, address, and phone number entered at the time of ordering are correct and accurate.
new_p_364: In case of entering incorrect details, unavailability to receive the shipment, or package return — an additional charge for re-shipping may apply.
new_p_365: There may be exceptional areas where delivery time is longer according to the shipping company's policy.
new_p_366: In exceptional cases of force majeure, logistical delays, security situation, strikes, or circumstances beyond the company's control — delivery times may be extended and will not be considered a breach of commitment by the company.
home_h3_15: Experience with Dogs at All Life Stages
home_li_88:
Daily attention
            Every dog in our boarding facility receives personal monitoring throughout the day — walks, feeding at regular hours and warm human contact that reduces separation anxiety, while maintaining their overall health. We ensure healthy and quality nutrition, routine veterinary care such as vaccinations and deworming, and of course availability for emergency treatments.
home_li_89:
Safe and clean facilities
            Our facility is maintained according to strict cleaning protocols. Dogs stay in spacious, ventilated and sanitized spaces — because your dog's health is our top priority.
home_li_90:
Experience with dogs at all life stages
            From newborn puppies to senior dogs — our team is skilled in caring for changing needs, including dogs with special sensitivities, different breeds, and diverse temperaments.
home_li_91:
Reliability and personalized service


            

We work with small and large breeds and offer reliable and professional service. Additionally, we also offer home delivery option for your convenience, as part of our service tailored to your needs.

contact_h1_1: We'd Love to Hear from You
contact_p_13:
Any question about puppies, or our store, we are here for you. 
 Contact us about any matter and we will get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_p_14:
Personal, warm and professional service
Because your dog is as important to us as they are to you.
contact_p_15: We are here for you and your dogs, contact us in the way that's most convenient for you
contact_p_16: Available on WhatsApp and phone Sunday–Friday, during business hours. Happy to answer any questions about the equipment store and puppies.
contact_p_17: Send us a message at any time and we'll get back to you as soon as possible. Suitable for questions about Gorim BaKfar, scheduling appointments, or product information.
contact_p_19:
You're welcome to come and get to know the place, meet the puppies, and tour the equipment store and facilities.
We'd be happy to see you!
contact_p_21:
Do you have a question about the puppies or the store? 
We'd love to hear from you and get back to you as soon as possible.
contact_p_22: For questions about the store or puppies for sale — we're here for any inquiry. You can contact us through the contact form above, by phone, or by email.
contact_p_23: We make sure to respond to every inquiry within one business day. For urgent questions — feel free to call directly.
contact_p_24: The Puppies in the Village facility is open for visits by appointment only. If you'd like to meet the puppies or choose equipment at the store — we'd be happy to schedule a convenient time.
contact_p_25:
You can schedule a visit by phone, WhatsApp, or email. 
We'll make sure everything is ready for your visit.

our_cubs_h1_1: A Responsible and Loving Breeding Home
our_cubs_h2_3: From the first moment to your home
our_cubs_h2_5: Ready to meet your new life companion?
our_cubs_h3_6:
Find your new best friend - healthy, vaccinated puppies full of love
Every puppy grows up at home, surrounded by warmth and love. We breed selected breeds to the highest standards of health, socialization and care
because every dog deserves the best start in life.
our_cubs_p_24: We specialize in responsible and loving breeding of quality puppies. All our puppies grow up in the best conditions with close veterinary supervision, emphasizing early socialization and genetic health.
our_cubs_p_26: A gentle and loving dog, ideal for apartment living and families with children. Friendly, happy and full of love — bonds quickly with everyone.
our_cubs_p_28: One of the smartest breeds in the world. Learns quickly, loyal and exciting to train. Suitable for allergy sufferers — their coat hardly sheds and requires minimal grooming.
our_cubs_p_30: A loyal and cheerful family dog, known for its quick learning ability and love for humans. Suitable for families with children, loves water and outdoor activities. One of the most popular breeds in the world.
our_cubs_p_32: The classic family dog — patient, loves children and feels comfortable with everyone. Loyal and cheerful, one of the most popular breeds in Israel.
our_cubs_p_33:
At Gorim BaKfar, every puppy goes through a meticulous journey of care, development and learning
so they arrive to you healthy, balanced and ready for family life
our_cubs_p_34: From the moment of birth, every puppy receives a warm envelope of attention, natural nursing and a clean, safe environment. We accompany the mother and puppies around the clock during the critical first weeks.
our_cubs_p_35: At this stage we monitor the weight, behavior and health indicators of each puppy individually. Vaccinations, veterinary treatments and socialization with humans — everything is planned and documented.
our_cubs_p_36: Before delivery we speak with each family personally — explaining about the breed, needs, nutrition and proper behavior. This way the puppy arrives to a home that's ready to receive them.
our_cubs_p_37: On delivery day the puppy comes with a complete document folder, initial supplies and our phone number — because we're here afterwards too. We continue to support every owner during the first weeks at home.
our_cubs_p_38:
Our puppies grow up with love, professionalism and genuine care.
Contact us today for details about available puppies, breeds and the adoption process.
our_cubs_p_39: All puppies are vaccinated according to a complete vaccination schedule and treated with anti-parasite medications.
our_cubs_p_40: Every puppy comes with a complete health certificate from a licensed veterinarian.
our_cubs_p_41: The puppies grow up in a warm home environment and undergo socialization with humans and other dogs.
our_cubs_p_42: We're here afterwards too — full support, consultation and guidance throughout the dog's entire life.
our_cubs_p_43: All puppies are registered with the recognized breed organization and come with a full pedigree certificate.
our_cubs_p_44: You can also call and schedule a visit to the village
our_cubs_p_46: We're here for all your dog's needs — from responsible breeding to equipment store.
our_cubs_p_47: © 2026 Cubs in the Village. All rights reserved.

accessibility_p_20: Our commitment to digital accessibility for the general public
accessibility_p_21: Gorim BaKfar is committed to making services accessible to the general public. We work to implement the Israeli Standard (IS 5568) guidelines based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.
accessibility_p_22: We believe in equal rights and in every person's right to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.

new_resident_guide_h1_1:
Everything You Need to Know
For Your New Puppy
new_resident_guide_h2_4: Frequently Asked Questions About Raising a New Puppy
new_resident_guide_h2_5: Ready to Welcome Your New Puppy?
new_resident_guide_h3_6: The Complete Guide to Raising a Puppy at Home: Equipment, Nutrition, Health and Training — From Day One to a Successful First Year.
new_resident_guide_h3_7: Essential Equipment for a New Puppy
new_resident_guide_h3_8: Proper Nutrition at a Young Age
new_resident_guide_p_26: Got a new puppy home? We're here to help at every stage — from initial equipment to ongoing support. Puppies in the Village offers a variety of services and products that will make the beginning a pleasant and safe experience.
new_resident_guide_p_27: The complete shopping list that will ensure the puppy arrives to a prepared and organized home:
new_resident_guide_p_28: Balanced nutrition is the foundation for healthy growth. In our store you'll find:
new_resident_guide_p_29: The right beginning determines character for years. We recommend:
new_resident_guide_p_30: Puppy health starts with simple and early steps:
new_resident_guide_p_31: Dreaming of expanding the family? Our puppies grow in a safe environment:
new_resident_guide_p_33: Bringing a new puppy home is an exciting and loving experience. With a little knowledge and patience, you can give him the best foundation for a healthy and happy life. Here's everything important to know in the first weeks.
new_resident_guide_p_34: Feed the puppy three to four times a day in small, measured portions, according to his age and breed. Make sure there's always a clean and full water bowl within reach. It's better to continue with the same food he received from the breeder in the first weeks, and gradually change if needed.
new_resident_guide_p_35: Treats are an essential tool for training and bonding. Choose small, protein-rich treats designed for puppies. Avoid human food, chocolate, onions and garlic. Reward with a treat immediately after desired behavior — the puppy learns quickly when the reward is immediate and consistent.
new_resident_guide_p_36: Bathe the puppy for the first time only after he has adapted to your home, usually after a week or two. Use gentle shampoo designed for puppies and lukewarm water. Daily short brushing strengthens the bond between you and gets him used to touch — it's important to do this gently and in a pleasant atmosphere.
new_resident_guide_p_37: The first nights may be challenging — the puppy might cry and miss his mother and siblings. Prepare a comfortable and protected bed for him, possibly with a warm water bottle wrapped in a blanket. Be consistent and calm — in most cases the puppy adapts within a few days and starts sleeping peacefully.
new_resident_guide_p_38: Puppies aged 8–16 weeks sleep between 16 to 20 hours per day. Deep sleep is essential for growth, nervous system development and immune system strengthening. Don't worry — a tired puppy is a healthy puppy growing as he should.
new_resident_guide_p_39: We've brought you the questions every puppy owner asks in the first weeks — with direct and practical answers from our experience at Puppies in the Village.
new_resident_guide_p_40: The secret is consistency and patience. Immediately after sleep, eating and play — take the puppy to the pad and praise him warmly when he succeeds. Choose one fixed location, don't change it, and make sure the pad is always clean. Within two to three weeks most puppies understand the expectation.
new_resident_guide_p_41: Avoid scolding after the fact — the puppy won't connect the scolding with the action he did. A quiet reaction and quick cleanup are much better.
new_resident_guide_p_42: Proper cleaning is crucial — if odor remains, the puppy will continue returning to the same spot. Use an enzyme solution specifically for pets (not regular soap water) that breaks down the proteins in urine and completely eliminates the odor.
new_resident_guide_p_43: Wipe the area, apply the solution, leave for a few minutes and then wipe again. Avoid cleaning products with ammonia — their smell is similar to urine and may worsen the problem.
new_resident_guide_p_44: This is a question that concerns every puppy owner. Medically speaking, until the completion of the basic vaccination series (usually around 16 weeks of age), contact with unvaccinated dogs and unknown public ground should be limited.
new_resident_guide_p_45: However, social exposure is equally crucial. You can carry the puppy in your arms, visit homes with vaccinated dogs, and familiarize them with different environments in a controlled manner — in coordination with your veterinarian.
new_resident_guide_p_46: Start with a light, soft collar that you put on the puppy for a few minutes a day during play or feeding time, so they associate it with a positive experience. After several days, attach a short leash and let the puppy drag it around the house.
new_resident_guide_p_47: When the puppy is comfortable with the leash, take the end in your hand and start following them. Gradually reverse the direction — the puppy will learn to walk beside you. Don't pull forcefully; use treats and encouragement.
new_resident_guide_p_48: Absolutely yes. A crate is an excellent tool — when introduced properly, the puppy sees it as their own safe and quiet place, not a punishment. It also helps greatly with house training, as puppies avoid soiling their sleeping area.
new_resident_guide_p_49: A puppy gate allows you to create a safe area in the house where the puppy can play freely without reaching dangers. A combination of gate and crate gives the puppy a clear framework and gives you peace of mind in the first weeks.
new_resident_guide_p_50: It's recommended to take the puppy for their first checkup within 48-72 hours of bringing them home. The veterinarian will examine their general condition, verify the vaccination protocol that has begun, and customize a personal treatment plan.
new_resident_guide_p_51: The basic vaccination series usually includes 3 doses at ages 6-8, 10-12, and 14-16 weeks, followed by annual vaccination. Additionally, worms and fleas should be treated according to veterinary guidelines. Don't delay — vaccinations protect both your puppy and the environment.
new_resident_guide_p_52: We're here for any question, personal consultation, or anything you'll need before your puppy's arrival. Whether it's initial equipment, suitable food, or simply a consultation call — the Gorim BaKfar team will be happy to accompany you at every stage.
new_resident_guide_p_53: We're here for all your dog's needs — from responsible breeding to equipment store.

new_text_316_2: ">Return Policy  and to
